# anon.li

> Privacy-first platform providing private email aliases and end-to-end encrypted file sharing.

## About

anon.li is a privacy-focused platform with two core products:

- **Alias**: Private email forwarding. Create disposable email aliases that forward to your real inbox without exposing your personal address. Supports custom domains, PGP encryption, and reply-via-alias.
- **Drop**: End-to-end encrypted file sharing. Upload files encrypted in your browser with AES-256-GCM. Zero-knowledge architecture — the server never sees your encryption keys. Public previews count as downloads because they expose the full encrypted file bytes.

All services are open source and designed with a zero-trust security model. API keys are managed from an authenticated dashboard session; API-key requests count against monthly API quotas.

- [Security](https://anon.li/security)
- [About](https://anon.li/about)

## Pricing

Canonical machine-readable pricing is available at https://anon.li/pricing.json.

- Bundle Plus: $3.99/month or $39.49/year. Bundle Pro: $5.99/month or $53.89/year.
- Alias Plus: $2.49/month or $23.89/year. Alias Pro: $3.49/month or $35.89/year.
- Drop Plus: $2.99/month or $29.89/year. Drop Pro: $4.49/month or $45.49/year.
- Free plans are available for Bundle, Alias, and Drop.
